ModMetaData.name: Invincible Xenotypes - Viltrumites
ModMetaData.author: Jimothy
ModMetaData.description:
[h1]Welcome to Invincible Xenotypes - Viltrumites![/h1]
To function, this mod requires Nalzurin's Viltrumite Xenotype mod, which itself requires Harmony and Vanilla Expanded Framework. Better Gene Inheritance is a soft requirement; without it, Viltrumite babies won't inherit genes properly. Incompatible with Butter++ as it prevents proper gene inheritance. Compatible and has integrations with Viltrumites in Rimworld.
Adds the Psychically Deaf, Pretty and Reduced Pain genes. Oh, and a little more...
[h1]Genetic Overhaul[/h1] There are too many genes to list here, so a basic rundown: Smart Atom genes: All archite + require smart atoms gene. Density Genes: Metabolic. Extreme. Almost genes: 99% immunity to vacuum and toxins.
If using the following mods, Viltrumites gain additional genes: FSF Advanced Bionics Adaptive Expression Superhero Genes VRE Genies, Hussar, Pigskin and Fungoid. Alpha Genes. Big and Small. More Genes Jimothy's Genes Outland - Genetics Brawnum Better Gene Inheritance Note that these mods are *optional*; you can play without them, your Viltrumites just won't have genes from / made using them.
If you use the Viltrumites in Rimworld mod, the Viltrumite variants from that will receive similar genetic overhauls, and this mod's Viltrumites act as the middle-child between Weak and Elite Viltrumites. Legendary / Argall Viltrumites are reduced from 12x capability to 7x, so they can be defeated through skill, numbers or tactics by lower tiers of Viltrumite.
If you use the Random Genetics Framework, there's a Hybrid Viltrumite xenotype. Basically Viltrumites but with lots of "random gene" genes.
[h1]Viltrumite Factions[/h1] 2 factions. Both: Optional, led by Viltrumites, Ultratech, hostile but can be befriended. If using Royalty, both have an honour system called "loyalty", gained by doing quests for them, which you can use for rewards. Elite Viltrumites are always tough with high melee skill, and usually attack alone. Viltrum Empire: Surface settlements. Uses Viltrumites, mechanoids and Vilgrunts (non-Viltrumite soldiers). Vilgrunts are typically well-equipped, well-trained, tough, have advanced bionics, and often highly specialized. Depending on the situation, even Viltrumites should fear them. Viltrumite Empire: Space settlements. Only uses Viltrumites.
[h1]Further Integrations[/h1] Superhero Suits: Adds super-durable but super-expensive supersuits.
[h1]Future Goals[/h1] For now, I consider this mod completed, but may add more mod integrations and such in the future. I may make more Invincible-related mods, adding more races and factions, however those would be their own mods.
[h1]FAQ[/h1] [b]I'd prefer this or that! Justify every decision![/b] 1. I have set this mod to load before the exported folder from Xenotype Exporter. Combined with Total Control, you can reshape both Viltrumites and their faction however you want, even if you don't know how to mod. 2. I made this mod for myself and my own games, so it's designed according to my own preferences. If you dislike those preferences... read the above point. 3. That said, feel free to make suggestions. If I like them, I'll integrate them so that everyone can enjoy them, regardless of if they're using the exporter.
[b]Huh? Why are you leaning towards my ear?[/b] *coughs blood* Mark. Watch my Youtube videos, Mark! https://www.youtube.com/@jimothyworldbuilding3664 Note that this channel is *NOT* Rimworld related. It's a worldbuilding channel. That said, you might notice some Rimworld-esque stuff in the worldbuilding, such as organ harvesting, war crimes, morbid hilarity and widespread cannibalism. Also I've got some Invincible-related videos planned.
